name: Transit.Style

values.name: fadeSlideLeft
values.comment: Combine fade and slideLeft with the specified offset

values.name: slideLeft
values.comment: Slide left transition, with the specified offset

name: Transit

unions.name: Action
unions.comment: Transition action, to be wrapped in your own action type.

unions.name: Transition
unions.comment: Opaque type for transition state storage.

aliases.name: Timeline
aliases.type: { exitDuration : Float, action : a, enterDuration : Float }

aliases.name: WithTransition
aliases.comment: Extended type for the target model holding the transition.

values.name: defaultTimeline
values.comment: Default timeline for this action: exit of 100ms then enter of 200ms.

values.name: getValue
values.comment: Extract current animation value (a float between 0 and 1).

values.name: init
values.comment:
A shortcut to `update` that initialize the transition with the following parameters:
* `actionWrapper` to wrap Transit's action into your app's Action type (saves you one `Effects.map`)
* `timeline` to setup transition
* `target` is the model storing the Transition, that will be updated with new transition state
Returns a tuple that you can directly return from your `update`.
values.type: (Action a -> a) -> Timeline a -> WithTransition target -> ( WithTransition target, Effects a )

values.name: initial
values.comment: Empty transition state, as initial value in the model.

values.name: timeline
values.comment:
Build the timeline:
> exitDuration => action => enterDuration

values.name: update
values.comment:
Where all the logic happens. Run transition steps, and triggers timeline's action when needed.
* `actionWrapper` to wrap Transit's action into app's Action type (saves one `Effects.map`),
* `action` is the Transit action to process,
* `target` is the model storing the Transition, that will be updated with new transition state.
values.type: (Action a -> a) -> Action a -> WithTransition target -> ( WithTransition target, Effects a )
